heroSubtitle: A modern, transparent policy designed to be clear and easy to skim. Our primary color is #028090.
dataLifecycleSubtitle: How your data travels through our system — from collection to deletion.

lifecycle.title: Collect (Minimal)
lifecycle.desc: We only ask for the essentials to create your account and deliver core features.

lifecycle.title: Store (Encrypted in transit)
lifecycle.desc: Traffic uses TLS (HTTPS). Storage uses secure, access-controlled services.

lifecycle.title: Use (Purpose-bound)
lifecycle.desc: We use data solely to operate the platform, improve quality, and prevent abuse.

lifecycle.title: Share (When necessary)
lifecycle.desc: Limited sharing with trusted providers under data-protection agreements.

lifecycle.title: Delete / Export (Your control)
lifecycle.desc: You can request deletion or a portable copy; we respect applicable regulations.

sections.title: Introduction
bullets: We respect your privacy and aim for full transparency.
This policy explains what we collect, why, and how we use it.
Using our platform means you agree to this policy.
sections.body: We keep things concise and human-friendly. We never sell your data. We only process what is necessary to run the platform, improve reliability, and keep your account secure.

sections.title: What We Collect
bullets: Account data: name, email, role (Admin / Client / Freelancer).
Usage data: pages viewed, preferences, diagnostics.
Files: profile images and attachments related to projects.
sections.body: We collect the minimum data required to create your account, personalize your experience, and protect the system from abuse. Certain features store preferences locally in your browser.

sections.title: Cookies & Preferences
bullets: Session cookies to keep you signed in securely.
Preference cookies for language and theme.
You can control them from your browser settings.
sections.body: Cookies simplify your experience (remembering language, dark mode) and secure sessions. You can refuse some cookies, but a few features may not work as expected.

sections.title: Sharing & Third Parties
bullets: We do not sell your data to advertisers.
Trusted providers for email, storage, and analytics only.
We share the least amount of information necessary.
sections.body: We may rely on reputable vendors to deliver parts of the service. They are bound by data-protection agreements and only receive data required to perform their tasks.

sections.title: Security & Access
bullets: Role-based internal access (principle of least privilege).
sections.body: We secure traffic with TLS, restrict staff access by role, apply logging/alerting, and review our controls regularly. If a breach occurs, we will notify affected users where required by law.

sections.title: Your Rights
bullets: Access and receive a copy of your data.
Request correction or deletion where possible.
Withdraw consent and exercise data portability.
sections.body: Contact us to exercise your rights. We will verify your identity and respond within a reasonable timeframe according to applicable regulations.
